overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in an orange kimono walking through a lush, misty forest. The character moves steadily through dense vegetation as the environment gradually opens to reveal a distant snow-capped mountain, transitioning from enclosed woodland to a rocky outcrop with panoramic views.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense deciduous forest with misty atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense forest undergrowth with swords strapped to back

entered.detail: large mature trees with thick trunks forming a dense canopy overhead
lush green ferns and shrubs covering the forest floor
atmospheric mist hanging between the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, enclosed forest with tall trees and thick undergrowth. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled lighting on the ground, while mist hangs in the background between the tree trunks.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with emerging mountain views

events.description: snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible through gaps in the tree canopy

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path as the terrain gradually opens up

entered.detail: distant mountain with white snow peak visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The forest begins to thin slightly as the character progresses, with the lighting becoming more direct. A majestic snow-capped mountain emerges into view through the trees on the right, replacing the misty backdrop with a clear vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest edge overlooking mountain valley

events.description: terrain transitions from soft forest floor to rocky outcrop with large boulders

agents.ego_description: climbing onto rocky terrain while approaching the forest edge with mountain views

entered.detail: large moss-covered rocks and stone outcrops on the hillside
steep rocky mountain slope with patches of vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest onto a rocky outcrop with full sky visibility. Large boulders replace the soft undergrowth, and the snow-capped mountain dominates the center of the view against a clear blue sky as the terrain ascends slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, misty woodland that gradually opens into a wide, rocky vista dominated by a snow-capped mountain. It begins with the character walking through an enclosed forest where sunlight filters through a thick canopy to create dappled lighting amidst the undergrowth. As the character progresses, the trees begin to thin and the lighting becomes more direct, allowing a majestic snowy peak to emerge through the foliage on the right. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the forest onto a rocky outcrop, where large boulders replace the soft vegetation. Finally, the terrain ascends slightly to reveal the mountain dominating the center of the view against a clear blue sky.
